subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses unto a people who understand. Verily it is a revelation from the presence of the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات لقوم یعقلون انها لتنزیل من لدن مهیمن قیوم بها تمت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @proclamation to Muslims, @suffering and imprisonment
